questions.q: What is the name of the new oral GLP-1 obesity pill by Eli Lilly that received FDA approval on April 1, 2026?
questions.correctText: Eli Lilly's new oral GLP-1 obesity pill is named Foundayo.

questions.q: On April 1, 2026, the US Patent and Trademark Office revoked a patent belonging to which major video game company, related to summoning characters to battle?
questions.correctText: The US Patent and Trademark Office revoked Nintendo's patent on summoning characters to battle.

questions.q: What AI company experienced a significant leak of its Claude Code source code on April 1, 2026, leading to widespread copyright takedown requests?
questions.correctText: Anthropic experienced a leak of its Claude Code source code and issued copyright takedown requests.

questions.q: According to a report on April 1, 2026, why did Valve's Gabe Newell reportedly 'step back' from direct involvement in game development after Portal 2?
options: He wanted to focus on Steam Deck
He felt his ideas were stifling the team as everyone agreed with him
questions.correctText: Gabe Newell stepped back because he felt his ideas were stifling the team, as everyone kept agreeing with him.

questions.q: On April 1, 2026, what major NASA mission involving an SLS rocket and Orion spacecraft launched for an approximately 10-day mission around the Moon and back?
questions.correctText: NASA's Artemis II mission launched on April 1, 2026, for a mission around the Moon.
